case.title: GETTING EQUIPMENT C. v. BD. OF ZON. APPEALS OF CLEVELAND

opinion.h1: GETTING EQUIPMENT C. v. BD. OF ZON. APPEALS OF CLEVELAND, 396 U.S. 3 (1969)
opinion.h4: GETTING EQUIPMENT CORP. ET AL. v. BOARD OF ZONING APPEALS OF CLEVELAND ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO No. 136. Decided October 13, 1969
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
opinion.h4: FURMAN v. CITY OF NEW YORK, 396 U.S. 3 (1969)
opinion.p: 396 U.S. 3 FURMAN v. CITY OF NEW YORK ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK No. 142. Decided October 13, 1969
23 N.Y.2d 1011, 247 N.E.2d 281, appeal dismissed and certiorari denied.
J. Lee Rankin, Stanley Buchsbaum, and Theodore R. Lee for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
